businessSummary.oneLiner: Leading AI data analytics platform for government and enterprise, powered by Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI-powered data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue topped $650M in Q4 (+137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record, expanding across all military branches. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth. However, a Forward P/E of 114x presents extreme valuation risk.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Boot Camps - Short-term onboarding programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.benchmark: 6.5x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34.2x. 9.7x the S&P 500 overall avg of ~23x

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.benchmark: ~3x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34.2x. Reflects ultra-high-growth AI premium

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.benchmark: 2.39B shares outstanding. Down 25.3% from 52-week high of $207.52

keyMetrics.name: 52-Week Range
keyMetrics.benchmark: 52-week average $152.97. Current price near the average

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software Selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Reuters reports Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop software for the Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Rosenblatt maintains Buy with $200 target

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Fraud Detection Partnership (3/10)
growthDrivers.description: Partnering with Polymarket and TWG AI to build Vergence AI-based sports betting fraud detection platform. Entry point into the $244B fraud prevention market

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Official Program of Record (3/20)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designates Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all military branches confirmed, securing stable defense revenue

growthDrivers.title: LG CNS Strategic Partnership for Korean Market (3/11)
growthDrivers.description: Strategic partnership with LG CNS to deploy Foundry and AIP platforms across LG Group, accelerating AI transformation (AX) for Korean enterprises

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-Month Trial Contract (3/24)
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority adopts Palantir Foundry on a 3-month trial. Signals expansion into government regulatory sectors beyond defense

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as the key growth engine

growthDrivers.title: US Commercial Revenue Q4 +137% Explosion
growthDrivers.description: Q4 US commercial revenue $650M (+137% YoY). 180 deals over $1M, 61 deals over $10M. AIP boot camps driving rapid customer conversion

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearance, Maven military adoption, and combat-proven in the Iran conflict. A moat money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high once deployed
Top-level security clearance and 20+ years of government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve the same level
Rapid customer acquisition through AIP boot camps and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Used in real-time for thousands of strikes in the Iran conflict. Real combat data is a competitive advantage in itself

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Emerging defense AI/drone company. Pursuing $60B valuation funding round. Collaborating with Palantir on Golden Dome

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. But significantly behind Palantir in government/defense sector access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Big cloud players entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's depth of Ontology platform integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Trails Palantir significantly in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Polymarket AI Fraud Detection Partnership Revealed
recentNews.significance: Palantir partners with Polymarket and TWG AI to develop Vergence AI-based sports betting fraud detection platform. Targeting the $244B fraud prevention market

recentNews.headline: Selected for Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software
recentNews.significance: Named alongside Anduril as software development partner for Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense project

recentNews.headline: UK FCA Defends Palantir Contract Before Lawmakers
recentNews.significance: UK Financial Conduct Authority explains legitimacy of Palantir Foundry trial contract to parliament, addressing data access concerns

recentNews.headline: Pentagon Designates Maven Smart System as Official Program of Record
recentNews.significance: Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg issues memo designating Maven AI as official program. Long-term deployment across all military branches confirmed

recentNews.headline: Strategic Partnership with LG CNS for Korean Market Entry
recentNews.significance: Strategic partnership with LG CNS to deploy Foundry and AIP across LG Group. Accelerating AI transformation for Korean enterprises

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: Trailing P/E 222x, Forward P/E 103-116x vs IT sector avg 34x (3-6x premium). Any growth deceleration could trigger sharp decline

risks.title: Government Budget Dependency
risks.description: Significant revenue from US government/defense contracts. Vulnerable to administration changes or defense spending cuts

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution
risks.description: Share count increased 4.67% in one year. Ongoing SBC raises shareholder dilution concerns

risks.title: Geopolitical Risk and Ethical Controversy
risks.description: Ethical criticism over AI weapons technology involvement in Iran/Gaza conflicts. UK FCA contract also faced parliamentary scrutiny

risks.title: Downside From All-Time Highs
risks.description: Already down 25% from 52-week high of $207.52. Further downside risk during broader tech corrections

buyReasons.title: Monopolistic Position in Defense AI
buyReasons.description: Golden Dome $185B + Maven official adoption + Iran war combat validation. De facto standard for US defense AI

buyReasons.title: Explosive Commercial Growth
buyReasons.description: US commercial revenue Q4 +137%. High AIP boot camp conversion rates provide sustainable growth engine

buyReasons.title: Accelerating Global Expansion
buyReasons.description: LG CNS (Korea), FCA (UK), Polymarket (blockchain) - expanding across diverse industries and regions

buyReasons.title: Upside vs Analyst Targets
buyReasons.description: Average target $195 (+26%), Wedbush at $230 (+48%). Current pullback may represent entry opportunity

technicalPosition.summary: Trading above 50-day and 200-day MAs but RSI at 37 approaching oversold. MACD showing bearish signal
technicalPosition.trend: Short-term bearish, medium/long-term uptrend intact. Price above 50-day MA ($146) keeps base trend positive, but RSI 37 signals weak momentum

overallOpinion: Golden Dome $185B, Maven official adoption, combat deployment in Iran. Palantir's throne as the #1 US defense AI company is rock solid, and commercial revenue is exploding at +137% Q4
The elephant in the room is valuation. Forward P/E of 103-116x is 3x the IT sector average (34x). Even a slight growth slowdown could trigger a major correction
Down 25% from $207 highs with RSI at 37 near oversold territory. This pullback zone could be a dollar-cost averaging opportunity for long-term investors
Global expansion via LG CNS, Polymarket, and UK FCA is encouraging. But SBC dilution and ethical controversies require ongoing monitoring

sources.name: Motley Fool - Maven Program of Record
Korea JoongAng Daily - LG CNS Partnership

threads.hook: PLTR Deep Dive - The Light and Shadow of the Defense AI Throne
threads.text:
Palantir $154.96 | Market Cap $313B

Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection, Maven AI official program of record, combat deployment in Iran. Unrivaled position in defense AI.

Commercial is booming too. Q4 US commercial revenue +137%, LG CNS Korea expansion, Polymarket fraud detection - rapid diversification.

But Forward P/E of 103-116x is 3x the IT sector average (34x). Extreme valuation remains the biggest risk.

Down 25% from $207 highs - opportunity or still overpriced? Depends on whether growth sustains.

22 analysts rate Buy, avg target $195 (+26%).
Conditional Buy, DCA recommended.

x.fact: PLTR $154.96. Golden Dome $185B selected, Maven official military adoption. FY2026E revenue $7.4B (+65%). Forward P/E 103x. 22 analysts Buy, target $195.
x.witty: Palantir now does missile defense AND catches betting fraud. Swiss army knife of AI, except the P/E is 103x. Can growth keep up with that price tag?
x.empathy: PLTR holders who bought near $207 - down 25% hurts. But RSI 37 is near oversold and the long-term story just got stronger. Hang in there.

threads.fact:
Palantir Key Facts

Price $154.96, Market Cap $313B
Golden Dome $185B + Maven adoption cement defense AI dominance
FY2026E revenue $7.4B (+65%), EPS $1.34 (+113%)
Forward P/E 103-116x (3x IT sector avg of 34x)

threads.witty:
Palantir update: defending missiles, catching gambling fraud, and transforming Korean conglomerates with AI.

Basically the Swiss army knife of AI companies, but with a P/E of 103x, buying it feels like a gamble too.

Still, down 25% from highs... tempting.
threads.empathy:
PLTR holders, the ride from $207 down to $155 has been rough.

But look at what happened: Golden Dome selection, Maven official adoption, commercial revenue +137%. Fundamentals have only gotten stronger.

RSI at 37 suggests we are near a short-term floor. For long-term investors, this could be a DCA opportunity.
